headline: Assessing Tyler Technologies (TYL) Valuation As Shares Weaken And Fair Value Signals Conflict
summary: Recent performance snapshot Tyler Technologies (TYL) has drawn attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock down over the past day, week, month, past 3 months, year to date, and past year. Against that backdrop, investors are weighing a business that reports US$2.38b in revenue and US$315.73m in net income. The company is focused entirely on public sector software and technology management solutions in the United States. See our latest analysis for Tyler...

headline: Tyler Technologies Signs Agreement with Riverside County, California, Sheriff’s Office for Enterprise Corrections
summary: PLANO, Texas, May 12, 2026--Tyler Technologies announced it has signed an agreement with the Riverside County, California, Sheriff’s Office for Tyler’s Enterprise Corrections.

headline: Tyler Technologies’ US$1b Convertibles Reshape Capital Structure And Valuation Outlook
summary: Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) has launched a $1 billion offering of convertible senior notes. The company plans to use the proceeds for share repurchases and capped call transactions. The move represents a significant adjustment to Tyler Technologies' capital structure and financing mix. Tyler Technologies, trading on the NYSE under the ticker TYL, is undertaking this capital markets transaction with its stock at $312.27. The company’s shares are down 28.4% year to date and down 44.7% over...
